01 / HEALTH-TECH STARTUP · Nov 2025 – Present

PANTRIX

Smart Food Waste Reduction System · Founder & CTO · SNUC

PANTRIX is an AI + IoT-powered HealthTech solution designed to combat food waste in line with UN SDG 12.3. It integrates smart inventory tracking, expiry monitoring, and automated food donation into one seamless ecosystem — reimagining how homes, restaurants, and communities manage food resources.

Core Features
Smart load cell scale with ESP32 IoT — real-time weight & inventory tracking
AI predictive dashboard — forecasting food waste patterns & trends
Automated expiry monitoring with smart push-notification alerts
Automated food donation network connecting surplus to NGOs & shelters
Nutrition analysis module for healthier consumption patterns
Tech Stack
FlutterFirebaseESP32 IoTTensorFlow LitePythonReact.js
Awards Won

1st Prize — Drestein'25 (₹3,000 cash · 110+ teams)  ·  Impact Ignite Award — InnoClash'26 (International Hackathon)

02 / CIVIC-TECH PLATFORM · Aug 2025 – Present

LEGIT

Legislative E-Governance Insight Tool · SIH 2025 · SNUC

LEGIT is an AI-driven web platform modernising citizen-government engagement. Citizens can view upcoming bills, share feedback with ministries, and the system uses advanced NLP to analyse sentiment, summarise comments, and visualise governance insights.

Core Features
Public dashboard to view & track upcoming legislative bills
Citizen feedback portal — secure direct-to-ministry connections
NLP-powered sentiment analysis on mass public feedback
AI document summarisation of long policy texts
Data visualisation dashboards for governance insight
Tech Stack
NLP / AIReact.jsPythonData AnalyticsSentiment Analysis
Recognition

Selected for Smart India Hackathon 2025 — India's largest national hackathon by the Ministry of Education. Showcased LEGIT on the national stage (Team Quantum 6).

03 / AGRI-TECH INNOVATION · Oct 2025 – Present

TILAHAN SAATHI

Your Farming Companion — AI + Precision Agriculture Platform

Tilahan Saathi is a groundbreaking convergence of AI, agricultural economics, and precision farming targeting India's critical oilseed production challenges. A digital companion for farmers offering actionable AI insights, soil monitoring, and real-time market intelligence.

Core Features
AI crop recommendation engine optimised for oilseed farming
Agricultural economics analysis with real-time price prediction
Precision farming for yield optimisation
Real-time soil health monitoring via IoT
Multilingual interface for rural Indian farmers
Tech Stack
Machine LearningPythonData AnalyticsIoT
04 / ECO-TECH EXTENSION · Dec 2025 – Present

CHOICEPOINT

AI + IoT Carbon-Aware E-Commerce Extension

ChoicePoint is an AI + IoT browser extension intercepting e-commerce checkouts to score product carbon footprints, nudge sustainable choices, and reward green purchases — bringing environmental accountability directly into online shopping.

Core Features
Real-time carbon footprint scoring at checkout
Gemini Vision — AI product analysis from product images
Green choice nudges & sustainable product alternatives
Gamified rewards for eco-conscious purchases
IoT OPT101 sensor for physical product scanning
Tech Stack
PythonGemini VisionJavaScriptIoT OPT101Chrome Extension API

About Me

The Person
Behind the Work

I'm Nagadheepan, a B.Tech student in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Shiv Nadar University, Chennai (Class of 2029) — currently holding a stellar 9.52 SGPA. I bring a dynamic blend of creativity, technical expertise, and leadership to everything I take on.

I served as Head Boy of St. Britto's Academy and achieved the school's second rank in Grade XII CBSE — reflecting leadership and academic excellence simultaneously. As a passionate orator and artist, I've won multiple accolades in oratorical and art competitions.

I'm the Creative Head & Co-Founder of Dheenu Dhaanu Learners' Crew (DDLC), running the YouTube channel DDLC Edupreneurs — producing edutainment content and short films to inspire young learners across Tamil Nadu.

As Joint Secretary of Mylai Thiruvalluvar Tamizh Sangam, I've been organising Arivulalanjium competitions for 7+ years. I also hold the Hindi Praveen Pracharak — equivalent to M.A. Hindi — from Dakshin Bharat Hindi Prachar Sabha.

"Always curious, always creative — I aim to bridge the gap between technology, creativity, and social impact."
